creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reply received in private mail:

Teubel György, 08.04.07, 15:12h CEST:

> Hi!
> 
> Sorry for the late answer. I don't accept this patch, because this
> version doesn't work well in FreeBSD (i.e. it didn't work for me at
> all). I will contact the program's author as soon as possible and try to
> find the defect.
> 
> Best regards.
> György TEUBEL
